requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL provide AI runtime control contract and logic packages separated as `ai-runtime-control-contract` and `ai-runtime-control-logic`.

case.given: The AI runtime control logic package is implemented
case.then: The logic package SHALL NOT depend on `@cell/ai-organ-logic`
The organ logic package MAY depend on the AI runtime control logic package

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL map AI mailbox entries and cooperative execution state to vendor actor-control work classifications.

case.given: An actor is waiting on an inflight LLM or synchronous child result
case.when: The matching completion mailbox entry is pending
case.then: The AI mailbox policy SHALL classify the entry as mandatory completion

case.given: An actor has pending human input, member chat, member coordination, ordinary control, ordinary tool result, or heartbeat mailbox work
case.when: The AI mailbox policy classifies the entry
case.then: The entry SHALL remain recoverable input, control marker, timer wake, or low priority continuation according to AI semantics
The classification SHALL NOT force every pending mailbox into mandatory completion

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL expose an AI turn barrier that can be reused by snapshot save, idle preemption, heartbeat eligibility, recovery scheduling, and TUI settled checks.

case.given: The current runtime is evaluated for snapshot safety
case.when: The AI turn barrier is inspected
case.then: The returned result SHALL preserve the existing safepoint safe/blocker semantics
The result SHALL NOT require `AiAgentVm` contract expansion

case.given: A wake mailbox entry has been delivered to an actor
case.then: The actor has not drained that mailbox entry into conversation or cooperative state
The barrier SHALL report the runtime as unsafe
The blocker metadata SHALL NOT include raw mailbox payloads

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL model AI runtime durable heads as a cohort guarded by AI turn barriers.

case.given: A runtime snapshot and conversation head are both recoverable truth heads
case.when: The runtime has not reached the snapshot barrier
case.then: The AI durable head cohort SHALL prevent advancing the latest recoverable conversation head independently from the runtime snapshot
